pro_brother.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World

content:
"Everybody Wants To Rule The World" - Tears For Fears

(Standard Tuning / No Capo)

This is based off georgiarose16's cover on youtube. Any comments or corrections are welcome.

Chords needed:
A:     x02220
Em11:  000000 - (Play all strings open)
Em:    022000
F#m11: x44200
G#m*:  x66400 (G#m(b6))
G6:    320000
G:     320033
D:     x00232
Bm:    224432
C/G:   332010


[Intro]

[tab][ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Em11[/ch]
(Progression repeats through the verses)[/tab]
               
Welcome to your life
There's no turning back
Even while we sleep
We will find you

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Acting on your best behavior[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*              [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Turn your back on mother nature[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]       ([ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Em11[/ch] intro progression)
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]

(..continue progression)
It's my own design
It's my own remorse
Help me to decide
Help me make the 

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F#m11[/ch]
most of freedom and of pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*         [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody  wants to rule the..[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
There's a room where the light won't find you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Holding hands while the walls come tumbling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
When they do I'll be right behind you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F#m11[/ch]
So glad we've almost made it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*        [ch]F#m11[/ch]
So sad they had to fade it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]       ([ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Em11[/ch] intro progression)
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]C/G[/ch] - [ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]C/G[/ch] - [ch]G6[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch]

(Repeat intro progression)

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]F#m11[/ch]
I can't stand this indecision[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*           [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Married with a lack of vision[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody  wants to rule the..[/tab]

[tab][ch]G6[/ch]              [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Say that you'll never never never never need it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*        [ch]F#m11[/ch]
One headline why believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]       ([ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Em11[/ch] intro progression)
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]F#m11[/ch]
All for freedom and for pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]*         [ch]F#m11[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m11[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]       ([ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Em11[/ch] intro progression)
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]
